description_long: This is a bolt-action sniper rifle with a matte olive-green chassis and a long, black barrel. The rifle features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision aiming at long distances. The stock is a fixed thumbhole type, providing ergonomic support and stability for the shooter. The magazine is a detachable box style, partially visible beneath the receiver. The bolt handle is clearly seen protruding from the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The overall construction appears robust, with metallic and polymer components typical of modern tactical rifles.
description: A bolt-action sniper rifle with an olive-green chassis, long black barrel, telescopic scope, and a fixed thumbhole stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, thumbhole stock, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the scope alignment, bolt handle, and the slim profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the rifle, including the stock, scope, and barrel.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the barrel, magazine area, and the bolt handle's position.
